body.en: You realize the real hurdle isn't the content, but the professor's assumption that you already know it.
body.zh: 你发现真正的难点不是知识点，而是老师默认你早就知道。

body.en: You repeated yourself three times, but they still heard a different word.
body.zh: 你说了三遍，对方还是听成了另一个词。

body.en: The exams are over, but you don't feel as relieved as expected.
body.zh: 考试结束了，但你没有想象中那么轻松。

body.en: Without registration, opening a bank account, getting insurance, and extending your visa become complicated.
body.zh: 没有住址登记，后面的银行、保险、延签都会变得微妙。

choices.en: Ask your roommate to confirm the Wohnungsgeberbestätigung
Shove the envelope in a drawer

body.en: Anna says we can chat about the presentation over coffee.
body.zh: Anna 说 presentation 可以顺便聊一下。

body.en: You have reached or exceeded the annual limit of half-day work. While short-term cash flow looks good, long-term compliance and visa renewal explanations will become burdensome.
body.zh: 你已经接近或超过全年半天额度。短期现金流很好看，但长期合规性和续签解释都会变得沉重。

choices.en: Switch to scholarships and on-campus jobs
choices.zh: 转向奖学金和校内岗位

body.en: Your APS results and academic background are strong enough to aim for top research universities or TU9 programs, but your application materials must be more refined.
body.zh: 你的 APS 结果和成绩背景足以冲刺更强的研究型大学或 TU9 项目，但申请材料也要更精细。

choices.en: Keep Universities of Applied Sciences as backup
choices.zh: 保留应用科学大学兜底

body.en: You passed APS, but your score and background are tight. You can still apply, but you need more safety schools, preparatory courses, or restricted admission strategies.
body.zh: APS 通过了，但分数和背景比较紧。你仍能申请，但需要更多保底、预科或受限专业策略。

body.en: Your APS score allows you to apply to many comprehensive and applied science universities. A strategic selection is more important than blindly chasing top names.
body.zh: 你的 APS 分数可以申请不少综合大学和应用科学大学。选校策略比盲目冲名校更重要。

choices.en: Mix comprehensive and applied science unis
choices.zh: 综合大学 + 应用科学混申

body.en: The application deadline is approaching. To pass APS, you need complete documents, sufficient funds, language skills to explain your courses, and solid review of major subjects.
body.zh: 距离申请季结束越来越近。要参加 APS，至少需要材料齐、钱够、语言能说明课程、专业课复习到位。

body.en: You haven't truly departed yet. APS verifies the authenticity of your academic documents and eligibility, and uses interviews or TestAS to confirm you actually studied the courses on your transcript.
body.zh: 你还没有真正出发。APS 会核查学历材料真实性和入学资格，并通过面谈或 TestAS 检查你是否真的学过成绩单上的课程。

body.en: You drag two suitcases out of the station. APS, admission, visa, insurance, and blocked account proofs are all done. Now it's time to handle local German procedures.
body.zh: 你拖着两个箱子出站。APS、录取、签证、保险证明和冻结账户证明都已经在出发前完成，现在要把德国本地手续接上。

choices.en: Go to the dorm to drop off luggage
Head straight to the supermarket and dm for essentials
choices.zh: 立刻去超市和 dm 补生活用品

choices.en: Activate SIM card and banking app first
choices.zh: 先激活 SIM 卡和银行 App

choices.en: Sit at the station to catch your breath

body.en: Your frozen account is active, but the Girocard/debit card is still on its way. Every payment feels like an exam.
body.zh: 冻结账户已激活，但 Girocard/借记卡还在路上；每个付款场景都像考试。

body.en: You've finally experienced a classic side quest of life in Germany.
body.zh: 你终于拥有了德国生活的一项经典支线。

body.en: Someone is selling a bike cheap. The brakes squeak loudly.
body.zh: 有人低价出一辆自行车，刹车声很有存在感。

body.en: The standard proof of funds for a 2026 student visa is 11,904 EUR/year. Funds are not available all at once; typically, a maximum of 992 EUR is released monthly after activation.
body.zh: 2026 年学生签证常见资金证明是 11,904 EUR/年。钱不是一次性可用，激活后通常每月最多释放 992 EUR。

choices.en: Ask bank support for release dates
choices.zh: 问银行客服确认释放日

choices.en: Work part-time to cover cash flow

body.en: The boss says they're short-handed this week and asks if you can pick up an extra shift.
body.zh: 老板说这周人手不够，希望你多来一次。

body.en: You're not exactly sleepy, but you have zero motivation to move.
body.zh: 你不是很困，但也完全不想动。

body.en: You suddenly doubt whether you want to stay in Germany, return home, pursue a PhD, or change careers.
body.zh: 你突然不确定自己到底想留德、回国、读博还是转行。

choices.en: List pros and cons of each path
Don't think about the future yet

body.en: You grab a stack of flyers and a dose of reality.
body.zh: 你拿到一堆传单，也拿到一点现实感。

body.en: You thought you could swipe your card, but the clerk pointed to the ATM at the entrance.
body.zh: 你以为可以刷卡，店员指了指门口的 ATM。

body.en: A ticket to a neighboring city is so cheap it feels like a temptation to escape your homework.
body.zh: 一张去邻城的票很便宜，便宜到像是在诱惑你逃离作业。

body.en: The letter is short, but you read it three times to be sure it wasn't bad news.
body.zh: 信不长，但你读了三遍才确定它不是坏消息。

body.en: Li says they cooked extra tonight and asks if you want to join. You're hungry but feel a bit awkward.
body.zh: 李同学说今晚多做了菜，问你要不要过去。你很饿，也有点不好意思。

choices.en: Go empty-handed but offer to wash dishes
Decline, return to dorm for instant noodles

body.en: There's an event on the bulletin board that doesn't look too awkward.
body.zh: 公告栏上有一个看起来不太尴尬的活动。

body.en: A hackathon this weekend. Free pizza, sleep at your own risk.
body.zh: 周末有场 Hackathon，披萨免费，睡眠自费。

body.en: Someone on Moodle asked the question you were about to ask.
body.zh: 有人在 Moodle 里问了你也想问的问题。

body.en: You're unsure whether to submit your CV in English or German.
body.zh: 你不知道该投英文简历还是德文简历。

body.en: The professor said you can apply for one extension, but you need a valid reason.
body.zh: 老师说可以申请一次延期，但需要合理理由。

body.en: The translation looks formal—so formal it sounds unnatural.
body.zh: 翻译结果看起来很正式，正式到不像人话。

body.en: The Foreigners' Office has written to demand an explanation of your status. Previous delays or illegal work have turned the risk from background noise into a countdown.
body.zh: 外管局来信要求你尽快说明身份状态。之前的拖延或不合规打工已经让风险从背景音变成了倒计时。

choices.en: Bring all documents and fix it in person
Ask the International Office to intervene
choices.zh: 请学校 International Office 介入

body.en: You start worrying if your deposit will be fully refunded upon moving out.
body.zh: 你开始担心退房时押金会不会完整回来。

body.en: Your account is empty; hunger and stress are rising. Someone offers cash-in-hand work: daily pay, no ID checks, no contract. It could save this month, or jeopardize your residency.
body.zh: 账户已经见底，饥饿和压力一起上升。有人说有现金工，当天结账、不问身份、不签合同。它能救这个月，也可能把你推向居留风险。

body.en: You delivered a full sentence at the counter, and the clerk understood it completely.
body.zh: 你在柜台前完整说完一句话，对方也完整听懂了。

choices.en: Strike while the iron is hot

body.en: You're starting to understand why everyone says to call first.
body.zh: 你开始理解为什么大家说先打电话。

body.en: Group members suggest hitting a bar tonight. Going or not isn't just a social choice: it affects your wallet, energy for tomorrow, and relationships.
body.zh: 小组同学说今晚去酒吧。去不去都不是纯社交选择：钱、第二天精力和关系都会变。

body.en: The legendary Altklausur has appeared in your cloud drive.
body.zh: 网盘里出现了传说中的 Altklausur。

body.en: Attending class doesn't auto-register you for exams; the system quietly waits for you to slip up.
body.zh: 考试不是上课就自动报名，系统静静等你犯错。

body.en: You recognize every word, but suddenly don't understand the sentences.
body.zh: 题目每个词都认识，连起来突然不认识。

choices.en: Do the questions you know first
Scan the whole paper to allocate time
choices.zh: 先扫整张卷子分配时间

choices.en: Stare at the first question and stall

body.en: Your exercise scores on Moodle remind you: understanding the lecture doesn't mean you can solve the problems.
body.zh: Moodle 上的练习分数提醒你：听懂课不等于会做题。

body.en: Your partner sends links to restaurants, shows, and trips to neighboring cities. Everything sounds tempting, but everything burns cash.
body.zh: 对方发来餐厅、演出和邻城旅行链接，每一项都很心动，每一项都在烧钱。

choices.en: Split costs but set a budget cap
Grin and bear it, follow all plans
Honestly admit your budget is tight

title.en: Weekend Plans with an Expensive Partner
title.zh: 高消费对象的周末计划

body.en: Your family forwards news that a peer your age is already working.
body.zh: 家里人转来一个同龄人已经工作的消息。

body.en: The professor speaks fast. The PPT looks familiar yet strange.
body.zh: 教授讲得很快，PPT 看起来很熟悉但又陌生。

choices.en: Ask classmates for materials after class

choices.zh: 当晚重看 Moodle 资料

body.en: A pot no one claims has appeared on the kitchen counter.
body.zh: 厨房台面上出现了没人承认的锅。

body.en: A friend shares their promotion news. You offer sincere congratulations, though a wave of nostalgia hits you.
body.zh: 朋友说升职了，你真心祝贺，也有一点恍惚。

body.en: You're in Germany, but your TestDaF isn't 4x4 yet. Language courses, housing, and living expenses are burning cash. Formal registration and classes are delayed.
body.zh: 你已经到德国，但 TestDaF 还没 4x4。语言班、住宿和生活费同时烧钱，正式注册和上课都会被推迟。

choices.en: Enroll in an intensive language course
Self-study for a week to save money
Ask the university about conditional registration

body.en: You notice that cheese, eggs, and fruit have all gone up in price.
body.zh: 你发现奶酪、鸡蛋和水果一起涨价了。

body.en: Anna asks if you want to do the presentation together.
body.zh: Anna 问你要不要一起做 presentation。

choices.en: Agree and take the lead on dividing tasks
Ask her to explain the grading criteria first

title.en: German Classmate Invites You to a Group

body.en: Every word in the letter matters, but you're only sure that the Beitragsnummer is important.
body.zh: 信里每个词都重要，但你只确定 Beitragsnummer 很重要。

choices.en: Photo it and send to the group chat

body.en: Your roommate thinks 19°C is reasonable; you, as a Southerner, demand dignity.
body.zh: 室友觉得 19 度很合理，你觉得南方人需要尊严。

body.en: A teaching assistant hints that there will be student assistant (HiWi) positions at the institute next semester.
body.zh: 助教说下学期研究所有学生助理位置。

body.en: You suddenly crave the taste of home.
body.zh: 你突然很想吃家里的味道。

body.en: Someone offered you a cash-only job with no contract and no recorded hours. The money comes fast, but it may violate visa, residence, and working hour regulations.
body.zh: 有人介绍一份现金结算的活，不签合同、不报工时。钱来得快，但可能违反签证/居留和工作时长规则。

choices.en: Refuse and find a legal Minijob
Take the illegal job to boost cash flow
Ask the university for legal advice first
Borrow money from parents for this month

body.en: Cash jobs lack payslips and clear hour records. You start worrying about how this might affect your residence permit and studies.
body.zh: 现金工没有工资单，也没有清晰工时。你开始担心这件事会不会影响居留和学业。

choices.en: Seek advice from ASTA or a lawyer
choices.zh: 找 ASTA 或法律咨询

choices.en: Continue working to earn the money first

body.en: Student public health and long-term care insurance are deducted monthly. In 2026, common rates for providers like TK are approx. 141-146 EUR/month.
body.zh: 学生公保和护理保险按月扣费。2026 年 TK 等公保学生费率常见约 141-146 EUR/月。

choices.en: Verify age and care insurance rates
choices.zh: 核对年龄和护理保险费率

choices.en: Contact insurer to change deduction account
choices.zh: 联系保险公司改扣款账户

body.en: Everyone brings a dish and a slice of their story.
body.zh: 每个人都带了一道菜，也带来一点各自的故事。

body.en: Your boss asks if you can work an extra shift this weekend. Your homework is asking the same question.
body.zh: 老板问你周末能不能多来一班，作业也在问同一个问题。

body.en: The exam date on the calendar suddenly feels imminent; all unfinished problems seem to glow.
body.zh: 日历上的考试日期突然变得很近，所有未完成的题都开始发光。

body.en: The group lab is about to start, but your partner's avatar is as silent as a default setting.
body.zh: 小组实验快开始了，搭档头像安静得像默认设置。

body.en: A long sentence at the counter hits you, and your soul briefly disconnects.
body.zh: 你在柜台前听到了一个长句，灵魂短暂离线。

body.en: You discover the dryer and your clothes failed to reach an agreement.
body.zh: 你发现烘干机和你的衣服并没有达成共识。

body.en: The university reminds non-EU students: part-time work is usually limited to 140 full days or 280 half days per year. Working more than 20 hours a week during the semester jeopardizes your residence permit and academic status.
body.zh: 学校提醒非欧盟学生：打工通常不能超过每年 140 个全天或 280 个半天，学期内每周超过 20 小时会让居留和学业状态变得危险。

choices.en: Only take jobs with clear contracts
Assume you won't exceed the limit

body.en: Someone in the group chat said half the class failed this course last year.
body.zh: 群里有人说这门课去年挂了一半。

body.en: You spot the same classmate in the library again and exchange a nod.
body.zh: 你又在图书馆看到同一个同学，互相点了点头。

body.en: You learn to use several databases and discover what 'search anxiety' really means.
body.zh: 你学会了几个数据库，也学会了什么叫检索焦虑。

body.en: Someone viewed your profile, but you haven't finished updating your project experience yet.
body.zh: 有人看了你的主页，但你还没写完项目经历。

body.en: The streets are quiet, and so is the dorm kitchen.
body.zh: 街上很安静，宿舍厨房也很安静。

body.en: Building numbers, entrances, and floors seem like three different systems.
body.zh: 楼号、入口和楼层像是三套不同系统。

body.en: A letter that looks very formal is sitting in your mailbox.
body.zh: 信箱里躺着一封看起来很正式的信。

body.en: The Mensa food is surprisingly good today.
body.zh: 今天 Mensa 居然挺好吃。

choices.en: Photo and post in group chat

body.en: The university sent a webinar link that feels like it was written just for you.
body.zh: 学校发来讲座链接，主题像是专门写给你的。

body.en: Assignments, reading, and daily chores start piling up all at once.
body.zh: 作业、阅读和生活琐事开始一起上门。

choices.en: Skip a work shift to finish homework

body.en: You suddenly remember that exam registration closes today.
body.zh: 你突然想起考试报名截止就在今天。

choices.en: Ask a classmate to guide you

body.en: At the classroom door, you realize your account, course selection, and materials are stuck due to incomplete registration. Semester fees are spent, but your studies are idling.
body.zh: 你到了教室门口才发现账号、选课和课程材料都卡在注册状态。学期费花了时间和精力，学业却开始空转。

choices.en: Rely on self-study for a week

body.en: The day before the deadline, the system starts acting up.
body.zh: 截止前一天，系统开始装死。

body.en: An unassuming quiz suddenly counts toward your continuous assessment grade.
body.zh: 一个不起眼的小测突然算进平时分。

body.en: You had a 12-second German conversation with a neighbor in the stairwell.
body.zh: 你在楼梯间和邻居进行了一场 12 秒的德语对话。

body.en: The bass from upstairs continues until dawn.
body.zh: 楼上低音持续到凌晨。

body.en: Booking the professor's office hours is harder than getting a table at a hot restaurant.
body.zh: 教授的 office hour 比热门餐厅还难约。

body.en: During a video call, your parents ask whether you plan to stay in Germany or return home after graduation.
body.zh: 视频电话里，父母问你毕业以后留德国还是回国。

choices.en: Say you want to stay in Germany
Say returning home is also an option

body.en: Your parents mention the exchange rate changed again; you sense the unspoken pressure.
body.zh: 父母说最近汇率又变了，你听懂了没说出口的压力。

body.en: It contains spices, medicine, and a note full of reminders.
body.zh: 里面有调料、药和一张写满叮嘱的纸。

body.en: Every deduction on your payslip looks like a foreign vocabulary test.
body.zh: 工资单上每个扣款项目都像陌生词汇测试。

body.en: The machine spat back two bottles. You start wondering if bottles need visas too.
body.zh: 机器吐回了两个瓶子，你开始怀疑瓶子也需要签证。

body.en: The pharmacist speaks slowly; for the first time, slowness feels like kindness.
body.zh: 药剂师说得很慢，你第一次觉得慢是一种善意。

body.en: Your professor warns that incorrect citation formats can cause major issues.
body.zh: 老师提醒引用格式不规范也可能出大问题。

body.en: After your presentation, some people nod, and a few even clap twice.
body.zh: 讲完后有人点头，还有人真的鼓掌了两下。

body.en: You forget the next word halfway through your presentation.
body.zh: 你讲到一半忘了下一个词。

body.en: You spent 40 minutes agonizing over the salutation and tone.
body.zh: 你花了 40 分钟纠结称呼和语气。

body.en: The professor actually replied, and it wasn't an auto-reply.
body.zh: 教授竟然回复了，而且不是自动回复。

body.en: The group document is finally open, but everyone's understanding differs slightly.
body.zh: 小组文档终于打开了，但大家的理解不完全一样。

body.en: The bus was on time, an email got a reply, and you finished a page of homework.
body.zh: 今天公交准点、邮件有人回、作业也写完了一页。

body.en: It gets dark early, and your mood follows suit.
body.zh: 天黑得很早，心情也跟着早退。

body.en: A previously overcharged fee has been refunded.
body.zh: 之前多扣的一笔费用退回来了。

body.en: Your landlord says they overcharged for utilities last month and has refunded the difference.
body.zh: 房东说上月杂费多收了一点，给你退回来了。

body.en: The line moves slowly, but everyone holds a stack of fate in their hands.
body.zh: 队伍移动得很慢，但每个人手里都拿着一叠命运。

choices.en: Go back to prepare documents first

body.en: The Einschreibung deadline has passed. Even if you pass the TestDaF later, you can't join this semester's regular studies. You must handle deferrals, language courses, or exception requests. Living costs keep burning, and mental stress becomes the main quest.
body.zh: Einschreibung 截止日过去了。就算之后 TestDaF 过了，也不能立刻进入本学期正常学习，只能处理延期、语言班或例外申请。生活费还在烧，精神压力开始变成主线。

choices.en: Request an exception with TestDaF and documents
choices.zh: 带 TestDaF 和材料求例外

choices.en: Transfer to a language course and wait for next semester
choices.zh: 转入语言班等待下学期

body.en: The night before the exam, your partner doesn't drag you out to party. Instead, they leave you quiet time and a meal.
body.zh: 考试前一晚，对方没有拉你出去玩，而是给你留了安静时间和一盒饭。

choices.en: Feel a bit cold due to anxiety

title.en: Exam Support from a Stable Partner

body.en: Rent and the deposit make your account balance look unfriendly.
body.zh: 房租和押金让账户余额看起来很不友好。

choices.en: Skip rent and hope next month's funds clear
choices.zh: 先欠着房租赌下月释放

body.en: You check your bills and realize this relationship is no longer just a romantic issue, but a cash flow crisis. Rent and insurance are waiting for you next month.
body.zh: 你翻开账单，发现这段关系已经不只是浪漫问题，而是现金流问题。下个月房租和保险都在等你。

choices.en: Discuss budgets clearly with your partner
Pick up more shifts to cover the gap
Keep swiping your card to maintain appearances

body.en: You've met a few people through events and dating apps. Student life in Germany is tough; a relationship could be your support system or a new risk.
body.zh: 你在活动和约会 App 之间认识了几个人。留学生活已经很难，亲密关系可能是支撑，也可能是新的风险。

choices.en: Choose a partner who cooks together
choices.zh: 选择会一起做饭的对象

choices.en: Choose a fun but expensive partner
choices.zh: 选择很会玩但花钱多的对象

choices.en: Take it slow, don't rush commitment

body.en: Your partner starts frequently borrowing money, disappearing temporarily, then suddenly becoming sweet when you try to exit. You realize this isn't a normal conflict.
body.zh: 对方开始频繁借钱、临时消失，又在你想退出时突然变得温柔。你意识到这可能不是普通矛盾。

choices.en: Stop transfers immediately and distance yourself
choices.zh: 立刻停止转账并拉开距离

body.en: There's a section on Nebenkosten in the contract; reading it only made you more confused.
body.zh: 合同里有一段 Nebenkosten，你读完更不确定了。

body.en: Cem reminds you that a procedure can be done online.
body.zh: Cem 提醒你一个手续可以线上办。

choices.en: Ask him to look with you

body.en: Your university sent a Semesterbeitrag email. While most German public universities don't charge high tuition, semester fees, student union dues, and transit tickets must still be paid on time.
body.zh: 学校发来 Semesterbeitrag 邮件。德国多数公立大学不是传统高学费，但学期费、学生会费和交通票仍要按时缴。

body.en: The semester ticket doesn't just appear on your phone. Another lesson learned.
body.zh: 学期票不是自动出现在手机里的，你又学到一件事。

body.en: You're starting to grasp the rhythm of German universities and why everyone says the first semester is an adjustment period.
body.zh: 你开始理解德国大学的节奏，也理解了为什么大家都说第一学期是适应期。

choices.en: Make an admin checklist for next semester
Grab dinner with friends to celebrate
Just lie flat and scroll on your phone

body.en: Your body reminds you that German winters aren't just background textures.
body.zh: 身体提醒你德国冬天不是背景贴图。

body.en: You discover that even plans called 'unlimited' have many restrictions.
body.zh: 你发现同样叫 unlimited 的套餐也有很多限制。

body.en: The snow makes the city quiet and the roads slippery.
body.zh: 雪把城市变得安静，也把路变得很滑。

body.en: The clerk asks where you're from, and you find yourself talking more than usual.
body.zh: 店员问你从哪里来，你突然多说了几句。

body.en: Your partner brought ingredients to your dorm to cook together. You chat about classes, rent, and the future. Dinner wasn't expensive, but it felt grounding.
body.zh: 对方带了食材来宿舍一起做饭。你们聊课程、房租和未来，晚饭没有很贵，但很踏实。

choices.en: Enjoy tonight, don't talk about the future

title.en: A Meal in a Stable Relationship

body.en: You discover an app that can save you money on transport or groceries.
body.zh: 你发现一个 App 能省下一些交通或超市钱。

choices.en: Save for later, ignore for now

body.en: A classmate mentions their shop is short-staffed and you could trial shift tonight.
body.zh: 一个同学说店里缺人，今晚就能试工。

body.en: You stand at the supermarket door, staring at your reflection in the glass.
body.zh: 你站在超市门口，和玻璃里的自己对视。

body.en: A rare piece of good news: Your Steuer-ID has arrived.
body.zh: 一封少见的好消息：Steuer-ID 到了。

body.en: No appointments available for the next three months.
body.zh: 未来三个月都没有可预约时间。

choices.en: Just wait for the system to release slots

body.en: The university reminds you: without a passing language certificate, you cannot formally register for German-taught programs. Every week delayed costs living expenses and missed classes.
body.zh: 学校提醒：没有合格语言证明，德语授课项目不能正式注册。每拖一周，都在花生活费和错过课程。

choices.en: Crash course and retake the exam
Apply for a language course extension

body.en: German-taught programs typically require TestDaF scores in all four modules. Your goal isn't the average, but achieving TDN 4 in Reading, Listening, Writing, and Speaking.
body.zh: 德语授课项目通常要看 TestDaF 四项小分。你的目标不是平均分，而是阅读、听力、写作、口语都达到 TDN 4。

choices.en: Register for the exam to secure a slot
Think you can take it in Germany

body.en: Your planned route suddenly becomes a puzzle.
body.zh: 你计划好的路线突然变成谜题。

body.en: You hold a package in front of four recycling bins.
body.zh: 你拿着包装盒，面对四个垃圾桶。

body.en: The TA explained a problem that stumped you for three days in just three minutes.
body.zh: 助教把一个你卡了三天的问题讲成了三分钟。

body.en: Your calendar reminds you that your visa or residence permit is nearing expiration. There's no green progress bar in the system, only Termins, documents, and endless emails.
body.zh: 日历提醒你签证或居留许可快到期。系统里没有绿色进度条，只有 Termin、材料和一封封邮件。

choices.en: Contact the Foreigners' Office and university immediately
choices.zh: 立刻联系外管局和学校

choices.en: Submit documents and apply for a Fiktionsbescheinigung
Keep refreshing for a Termin online
choices.zh: 只在网页上继续刷 Termin

choices.en: Hope they don't check on me

body.en: You post less on Moments, unsure how to summarize the week.
body.zh: 你发现自己越来越少发动态，因为不知道该怎么概括这一周。

body.en: Your potential roommates ask if you're usually noisy and if you're willing to help clean the kitchen.
body.zh: 室友问你平时会不会很吵，以及是不是愿意一起打扫厨房。

body.en: 4 PM feels like 8 PM.
body.zh: 下午四点像晚上八点。

body.en: Your legal work hours this week have exceeded 20. The money is coming in, but continuing this pace risks your employment record, payslips, and residency status.
body.zh: 这一周的合法工作时长已经超过 20 小时。钱确实进账了，但如果继续这样安排，雇主记录、工资单和居留身份都会变成风险点。

choices.zh: 向外管局/学校咨询许可
换成校内 HiWi 路线

body.en: You stood on the wrong platform at the right station.
body.zh: 你站在了正确车站的错误站台。

choices.en: Take a taxi to fix it
